messages.content: It looks like your message may have been cut off. Could you provide more details or let me know how I can assist you?
Traduci in inglese: "Leggi i colori dal rettangolo situato al centro da sinistra verso destra"
"Read the colors from the rectangle located in the center from left to right."

evidence: Traduci in inglese: "Leggi i colori dal rettangolo situato al centro da sinistra verso destra"
"Read the colors from the rectangle located in the center from left to right."
